title: VINN DUNN Folding Cosmetic Mirror 15cm With Magnification 1X/3X Chrome, Pre-Assembled Tilting Countertop, Dual-Sided Folding
features: FOLDING DESIGN: The delicately engineered post supports free tilting movements to achieve the perfect angle and position during make up process. Adjustable height at your own will.

DUAL-SIDED MIRRORS: Dual-sided vanity mirror for cosmetic application and grooming with high clarity. Normal reflection on one side and triple maginification on the other side. 1x and 3x magnification for detailed makeup looks, hair removal, and more.
FULL SCOPE SWIVELING: Smooth 360-degree swiveling mechanism on the mirror part for easy back-and-forth toggling.

PRE-ASSEMBLED: No more hustle in fiddling to get the mirror assembled when first receiving it. Vinn Dunn Folding Cosmetic Makeup Mirror comes with fully assembled with immediate use. Place it on your counter top, your cosmetic table, or wherever you go. Furthermore, packing it along with your luggage for travel-friendly beautification is without any questions.

COMPACT SIZE: The mirror frame is 15cm ( dia. ), the most suitable and comfortable size for counter top makeup, ideal for detailed cosmetic application, hair removal regiments, general grooming, skin care, and more.
PREMIUM QUALITY: Vinn Dunn Folding Cosmetic Makeup Mirror made from selected quality materials with upmost qulality control to ensure our products meet customer's satisfaction.
description: Product Description VINN DUNN Folding Cosmetic Mirror 15cm Mirror With Magnifying Mirror Magnification 1X/3X Chrome FOLDING DESIGN The delicately engineered post supports free tilting movements to achieve the perfect angle and position during make up process. Adjustable height at your own will. DUAL-SIDED MIRRORS Dual-sided vanity mirror for cosmetic application and grooming with high clarity. Normal reflection on one side and triple maginification on the other side. 1x and 3x magnification for detailed makeup looks, hair removal, and more. FULL SCOPE SWIVELING Smooth 360-degree swiveling mechanism on the mirror part for easy back-and-forth toggling. PREMIUM QUALITY BY Vinn Dunn The mirror frame is 15cm ( dia. ), the most suitable and comfortable size for counter top makeup. Ideal for detailed cosmetic application, hair removal regiments, general grooming, skin care, etc. Dedicated to ensure products meet daily use. 2 years warrantee. VINN DUNN LTD, an UK based hotel hospitality product supplier, offering you the best bathroom accessories Vinn Dunn Ltd, established in Glasgow, Scotland in 2013, is a company specialised in BESPOKE hotel appliances and bathroom accessories , supplying various hotel amenities that can be commissioned to any particular specifications or be tailored to the customs, styles, or usage of the hoteliers. In 2017, We established our first distributor warehouse in Rochester, Kent. Stocking more than 500 different hospitality products that distributing across the UK.
